description: Rollback files to a previous version state. Restores files to the version saved at the beginning of the turn (pre-turn state) by default. Supports: (1) version-specific restore with 'version' parameter, (2) glob pattern filtering with 'file_pattern', (3) specific path restore with 'paths' array, (4) dry-run preview with 'dry_run'. When 'version' is specified, restores to that exact version without deleting records. Without 'version', restores first snapshot and deletes version records.
name: history_rollback

turn_id.description: Required. Turn ID to rollback from.

paths.description: Optional. File or directory paths to rollback. Omit to rollback all files modified in the turn.

file_pattern.description: Optional. Glob pattern to filter files (e.g. '*.go', 'src/**/*.ts').

version.description: Optional. Version number to restore to. If omitted, restores to first snapshot (pre-turn state).

dry_run.description: Optional. Preview what would be restored without executing.
